title: chrysopogon tenuiculmis
intro: Chrysopogon tenuiculmis, also known as Vettiver, or Khus-Khus, is a type of grass native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used for centuries in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysopogon tenuiculmis include relieving stress, improving sleep, and reducing anxiety, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other pain. Chrysopogon tenuiculmis is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and powder, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its benefits.
